marketRegime.label: Bullish
marketRegime.explanation: Trend and momentum agree while RSI is not overheated, creating a cleaner test environment.

rules.entry: Enter only after a 4H candle closes above the 20 EMA (671.15) while MACD stays bullish and RSI holds below 65.
rules.exit: Exit when price closes below the 20 EMA (671.15) or MACD flips bearish on the 4H chart.
rules.stopLoss: Place a simulated stop 1.4x ATR (16.27) below entry, near 668.15; trail only after price moves in favor.
rules.positionSizing: Use a small simulated allocation capped at 25% of test capital; no leverage.

checks.label: Trend confirmation
checks.detail: BNB is trading above the EMA stack.

checks.label: Momentum quality
checks.detail: RSI and MACD support a measured strategy test.

checks.label: Volatility control
checks.detail: ATR is within an acceptable range for simulated stop sizing.

checks.label: Sentiment risk
checks.detail: Sentiment is not extreme enough to block the setup.

checks.label: Backtest drawdown
checks.detail: Recent simulated drawdown stays inside the risk cap.

riskGuard.principle: No trade is also a valid strategy.

safetyConstraints: Market and backtest outputs are for strategy testing only.

dataSource.note: BNB quote and Fear & Greed are loaded from CoinMarketCap REST API. RSI, MACD, EMA, ATR, and the backtest are calculated from live candles. If CMC OHLCV is unavailable, candle-based calculations transparently use the public BNBUSDT fallback.
